page.title: Yield reference
page.subtitle: How much mass survives each step from cherry to roasted bag. The house factors every milling and roasting run is measured against.

legend.title: New transform edges
legend.subtitle: This release teaches the lot graph three new mass-conserved transforms. Each mill output, roast batch, and byproduct stream is now its own tracked edge, and the conservation guard still balances every gram.
legend.mill: Parchment becomes green, the screen-graded and gravity-sorted output of the dry mill.
legend.roast: Green becomes roasted, shedding moisture as it develops.
legend.byproduct: Husk, chaff, screen rejects and defects, each tracked as its own stream so nothing quietly vanishes.

calc.title: Outturn calculator
calc.subtitle: Project a parchment lot through the mill and the roaster. Numbers only, nothing is saved.
calc.note: A planning estimate from the house yield curve. The real run posts its own measured mass and the conservation guard balances it.

empty.title: No yield factors on file yet
empty.description: The house yield curve seeds with the milling and roasting schema. Once it lands, every step from cherry to bag shows here.
